features.name: 2D unpacked array memory with parameterized dimensions
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array memory declaration where the packed dimension uses parameterized bit width and unpacked dimensions use parameterized array size, which may trigger incorrect BRAM mapping in certain synthesis tools.

features.name: 2D array access with independent x/y index variables
features.description: Code should include a 2D array accessed via separate x and y coordinate variables (pixel_position_x, pixel_position_y), which can cause issues when synthesis tools map this to BRAM address logic.

features.name: Multi-field concatenation for pixel/color data packing
features.description: Code should include concatenation of multiple fields with different bit widths (R/G/B pixel components) to form a packed pixel value, which when used with 2D array storage may cause BRAM data width mapping issues.

features.name: Bit slicing on unpacked array memory output
features.description: Code should include bit slicing operations on data read from an unpacked array memory (current_pixel_value bits extracted for R/G/B outputs), which can trigger out-of-bounds warnings during BRAM mapping.

metadata.title: Gowin BRAMS mapping using more DPB/SP's than expected in frame buffer
